channel.title: AzRoleWatcher
channel.description: Continuously monitor roles and permissions in Microsoft Entra ID and Azure.

item.title: 🆕 ADDED Azure role
item.description:
Id: 32109304-a0e2-4d64-bd07-b23ac5efbe43
Display name: Logic Apps Hybrid Contributor
Description: Full management of Logic Apps Hybrid, including creation, deletion, and updates.
Link: https://management.azure.com/32109304-a0e2-4d64-bd07-b23ac5efbe43?api-version=2022-04-01
